queries.question: List all customers with checking accounts born after 1990 and their respective account numbers. What are the corresponding maintenance fees and overdraft charges for these accounts?
queries.sql:
SELECT Accounts.AccountNumber, Customers.FullName, CheckingAccounts.Monthly_Maintenance_Fee, Overdraft_Charges FROM Accounts
JOIN Customers ON Customers.CustomerID = Accounts.CustomerID JOIN CheckingAccounts ON CheckingAccounts.AccountNumber = Accounts.AccountNumber WHERE SUBSTR(Customers.DateOfBirth, 1, 4) > '1990'

queries.question: Display a list of customers with a checking account, their accounts, their monthly maintenance fee, and overdraft charges for them.
queries.sql: SELECT Accounts.AccountNumber, Customers.FullName, CheckingAccounts.Monthly_Maintenance_Fee, Overdraft_Charges FROM Accounts JOIN Customers ON Customers.CustomerID = Accounts.CustomerID JOIN CheckingAccounts ON Accounts.AccountNumber = CheckingAccounts.AccountNumber
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?accountnumber ?fullname ?monthly_maintenance_fee ?overdraft_charges WHERE {
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?checkingaccounts a :CheckingAccounts .
  ?checkingaccounts p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?accounts p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?checkingaccounts p:Monthly_Maintenance_Fee ?monthly_maintenance_fee .
  ?checkingaccounts p:Overdraft_Charges ?overdraft_charges .
}

queries.question: List all customers with checking accounts born after 1990 and their respective account numbers and corresponding maintenance fees.
queries.sql:
SELECT Accounts.AccountNumber, Customers.FullName, CheckingAccounts.Monthly_Maintenance_Fee FROM Accounts
JOIN Customers ON Customers.CustomerID = Accounts.CustomerID JOIN CheckingAccounts ON CheckingAccounts.AccountNumber = Accounts.AccountNumber WHERE SUBSTR(Customers.DateOfBirth, 1, 4) > '1990'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?accountnumber ?fullname ?monthly_maintenance_fee WHERE {
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?checkingaccounts a :CheckingAccounts .
  ?checkingaccounts p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?accounts p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  OPTIONAL { ?customers p:name ?fullname . }
  OPTIONAL { ?checkingaccounts p:Monthly_Maintenance_Fee ?monthly_maintenance_fee . }
  ?customers p:DateOfBirth ?dateofbirth_s .
  FILTER(STR(SUBSTR(STR(?dateofbirth_s), 1, 4)) > "1990")
}

queries.question: Show all customers with checking accounts born after 1990 and their account numbers and corresponding fees.
queries.sql:
SELECT Accounts.AccountNumber, Customers.FullName, CheckingAccounts.Overdraft_Charges FROM Accounts
JOIN Customers ON Customers.CustomerID = Accounts.CustomerID JOIN CheckingAccounts ON CheckingAccounts.AccountNumber = Accounts.AccountNumber WHERE SUBSTR(Customers.DateOfBirth, 1, 4) > '1990'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?accountnumber ?fullname ?overdraft_charges WHERE {
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?checkingaccounts a :CheckingAccounts .
  ?checkingaccounts p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?accounts p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  OPTIONAL { ?customers p:name ?fullname . }
  OPTIONAL { ?checkingaccounts p:Overdraft_Charges ?overdraft_charges . }
  ?customers p:DateOfBirth ?dateofbirth_s .
  FILTER(STR(SUBSTR(STR(?dateofbirth_s), 1, 4)) > "1990")
}

queries.question: Display a list of customers that have a checking account, their accounts and the fee of that accounts.
queries.sql: SELECT Accounts.AccountNumber, Customers.FullName, CheckingAccounts.Monthly_Maintenance_Fee FROM Accounts JOIN Customers ON Customers.CustomerID = Accounts.CustomerID JOIN CheckingAccounts ON Accounts.AccountNumber = CheckingAccounts.AccountNumber
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?accountnumber ?fullname ?monthly_maintenance_fee WHERE {
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?checkingaccounts a :CheckingAccounts .
  ?checkingaccounts p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?accounts p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?checkingaccounts p:Monthly_Maintenance_Fee ?monthly_maintenance_fee .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show all customers with checking accounts born after 1990 and their account numbers and corresponding fees.
Display a list of customers that have a checking account, their accounts and the fee of that accounts.
